name: Ultimate CEO
description: Defeat the CEO to earn exclusive rewards and climb the rankings. This event tests your team's overall strength across multiple categories.
tips: Focus on teams with high DPS and Fan Capacity bonuses. Balance your attack and defense artists.

name: Grammy Contest
description: Compete in the ultimate music competition. Create the best song by combining different genres and artists to win the Grammy.
tips: Use artists with high Singing stats. Pop and EDM genres tend to score higher. Combine lead vocalist with supporting dancers.

categories.name: Best New Artist
categories.strategy: Use rising stars with high potential

categories.name: Record of the Year
categories.strategy: Combine Pop + EDM for max score

name: Radio Battle
description: Battle against other players through radio airplay. The more listeners you have, the higher your score.
tips: Schedule your releases during peak hours. Use artists with Charisma skills to boost listener count.

name: Daily Express
description: Complete daily challenges to earn quick rewards. A fast-paced event for daily login players.
tips: Complete all daily tasks. Save your best artists for the final challenges.

name: Ultimate Group
description: Form the ultimate idol group and compete against other groups. Teamwork is key to victory.
tips: Coordinate with group members. Use complementary artist roles (Vocalist + Dancer + Center).

name: Luxury Auto Show
description: Showcase your luxury vehicles and earn rewards based on your collection's value.
tips: Focus on upgrading a few high-value vehicles rather than many low-value ones.

name: Business Battle Pass
description: Complete business challenges to progress through the battle pass tiers and earn exclusive rewards.
tips: Purchase the premium pass for extra rewards. Complete weekly challenges for maximum points.

name: Fishing Event
description: Catch fish and earn rewards through the fishing mini-game
tips: Use bait strategically and participate in bonus hours

name: World Building
description: Build and upgrade your headquarters and other structures
tips: Prioritize HQ upgrades that increase revenue

name: Rally Event
description: Participate in group rallies to earn collective rewards
tips: Coordinate with group members and use rally-focused artists

name: TOP Season
description: Compete in the TOP leaderboard for exclusive rewards
tips: Build a balanced team with good defense and offense

name: Warm-up Event
description: Prepare for TOP season with warm-up challenges
tips: Use this time to test different team compositions

name: Single Car Challenge
description: Challenge content designed for single-car strategies
tips: Focus on artists with high single-target damage

name: Collectibles Event
description: Collect items from various regions for bonus stats
tips: Focus on one region at a time for maximum bonus

name: Light Up Constellations
description: A seasonal event where you collect constellation fragments to unlock rewards and new artists.
tips: Complete daily missions to get free constellation draws. Save gems for the final constellation.

name: Valentine's Day
description: Special Valentine's event with heart-themed challenges and exclusive romantic outfits.
tips: Complete love letter missions for bonus rewards. Exchange heart tokens for exclusive items.

name: City Supremacy
description: Compete to control different city districts and earn city-specific rewards.
tips: Focus on one city district at a time. Join forces with other players for maximum control.

name: Assets Exhibition
description: Display your valuable assets and compete for the richest collector title.
tips: Invest in appreciating assets. Balance between display value and practical benefits.

name: Stock Giants
description: Trade stocks and compete to become the biggest market mogul.
tips: Diversify your portfolio. Pay attention to market trends and timing.

name: Concert Performance
description: Host concerts and attract fans with your best performances.
tips: Use lead vocalists with high charisma. Upgrade your stage for better rewards.

name: Beauty Slot Machine
description: Spin the slot machine for a chance to win beauty products and artist shards.
tips: Save your spins for bonus multiplier periods. Complete collections for guaranteed rewards.

name: Gala Show
description: The ultimate fashion show event where elegance and style win.
tips: Match outfits to the theme. Use artists with high charisma and style stats.

name: Luxury Car Collector
description: Build your luxury car collection and compete with other collectors.
tips: Focus on completing car sets for bonus rewards.

name: Gold Earn Day
description: Special day with doubled gold rewards from all activities.
tips: Save your high-gold activities for this day. Deposit gold in the bank before the event.

name: Midnight Race
description: A late-night street racing event with dice-based movement and rewards.
tips: Plan your route carefully. Some tiles have better rewards than others.

name: Cooking Event
description: Cook dishes and serve customers to earn cooking-themed rewards.
tips: Upgrade your kitchen equipment. Complete dish collections for bonus rewards.

name: Produce 25
description: A special production event celebrating the game's anniversary with bonus rewards.
tips: Complete all daily missions. Save resources for the final day rewards.

name: Workaholic
description: A grind-intensive event for dedicated players with overtime bonuses.
tips: Play consistently throughout the event. Overtime hours give bonus multipliers.

name: Adventure Abroad: Tokyo
description: A cross-server, multi-week competition combining city-building, PvE, and PvP over a Tokyo-themed map.
tips: Cooperate with players from your home server. Focus on landmark upgrades for big rewards.

name: Adventure Abroad: Bali
description: A tropical adventure event set in Bali with island-themed rewards.
tips: Focus on beach attractions. Complete island tours for bonus rewards.

name: Adventure Abroad: Rome
description: A European adventure event in Rome with historical landmarks and roman-themed rewards.
tips: Build iconic Roman landmarks. Coordinate with your group for territorial control.

name: Echo Death Match
description: Survive and compete in the ultimate echo battle. Accumulate Echo Stones through solo and team battles.
tips: Focus on solo battles early to stock up, then team battles for bonus rewards.

name: Chamber Territory
description: Control different territories in the Chamber. Collect tokens and cards through territorial battles.
tips: Focus on capturing high-value territories early. Defend your territories for bonus rewards.

name: Cleanup Party
description: Clean up the city! Collect trash items and exchange them for rewards.
tips: Complete cleaning missions for bonus trash. Team up for faster collection.

name: Metro & Subway
description: Ride the Metro! Collect tickets and ride different lines to earn rewards.
tips: Focus on completing metro lines for bonus tickets. Different lines have different rewards.
